text: Imagine using a virus to fight a virus. Viral vector vaccines use a harmless virus shell to deliver genetic instructions to our cells. Once inside, these instructions help our immune system recognize and combat real threats. This method has been crucial in fighting diseases, including COVID-19. With ongoing research, viral vector vaccines may hold the key to future immunizations. Curious about how vaccines work? Like and follow for more science insights!
